hints.nonResident: Service provider outside Morocco: if the VAT reverse-charge option is enabled (Administration → Tax settings), VAT does not appear on the supplier invoice; the net amount payable takes into account any VAT withholding on the reverse charge (tax setting).

hints.dgiHint: HT / VAT / withholding amounts from validated invoices feed into the 1208 statement (purchases) and tax settings (monthly VAT / reverse charge — demo).
